headlines.description: — The Washington Wizards clinched the worst record in the NBA on Friday night with a 140-117 loss to the Miami Heat.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wizards clinch NBA's worst record with 140-117 loss to Heat

video.headline: Miami Heat vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Miami Heat vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights) 2026/04/10 ESHEET SOTFULL

headlines.description: — CJ McCollum scored 29 points and the Atlanta Hawks used a big third quarter to blow out the Cleveland Cavaliers 124-102 on Friday night, clinching a playoff spot and the Southeast Division title.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hawks clinch a playoff spot and Southeast Division behind 29 points from McCollum in rout of Cavs
